title: Precise Time Changer
description: This mod makes you able to change the time of your game, this is client side. You can use a slider/number input with the mod menu mod, or use the /clienttime command.
body:
# Precise Time Changer
This mod makes you able to change the time of your game, this is client side. You can use a slider/number input with the mod menu mod, or use the /clienttime command.

![Slider and input](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34afcb335fcf04be61fb558f83b98c005fb820f1_0.webp)

## Features:
- A **command** to change the client-side time, /clienttime
- A **slider** to change the time with a 24h converter
- An **input** to be more precise in putting in the time

This is was requested by ord3rr, QOL mod
